args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
grep -q '"name":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"scope":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q 'compile-region:prefill_attention' "$bundle_dir/vllm_integration.json"
grep -q '"scope_name":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/vllm_entrypoints.json"
[ -f "$bundle_dir/vllm-entrypoints/prefill_attention.sh" ]
[ -f "$bundle_dir/vllm-entrypoints/invoke_vllm_surface.py" ]
if grep -q 'decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected decode scope in scoped buildplan' >&2
  exit 1
fi
if grep -q 'decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected decode scope in materialization report' >&2
  exit 1
fi
if grep -q 'compile-region:decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/vllm_integration.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected decode surface in vllm integration report' >&2
  exit 1
fi
if grep -q '"scope_name":"decode_attention"' "$bundle_dir/vllm_entrypoints.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected decode entrypoint in vllm entrypoints report' >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf 'scoped-build\n'
